title: phaius longipes
intro: Phaius longipes, also known as the yellow ground orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phaius longipes include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Phaius longipes typically involve drying and processing the plant into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
